Records.authors: Bargiela, Piotr, Frellesvig, Hjalte, Marzucca, Robin, Morales, Roger, Seefeld, Florian, Wilhelm, Matthias, Yang, Tong-Zhi
Records.description: $I^{**}_{1,1,1}$ two-loop topology with three internal paths of lengths a=1, b=1, c=1 (neither v_L nor v_R carries external legs); 0-point integral, planar (b=1). Geometry: 0 ISPs; algebraic leading singularity; dlog form (§3.4 zero-ISPs)
